subcodes.first_line: O resplendent lamp! What light is brighter than the love of God, and what beam more radiant than the knowledge of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سراج وهاج چه نوری روشنتر از محبت اللهست و چه شعاعی ساطعتر از معرفت الله
subcodes.subjects: @ether; the phenomenon of light, @light and darkness, @love of God, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God
